LONG NAME: NC_NVGTN_ACTN_PLAN_CMPLT_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: This was not a required field until October 2019, so if a beneficiary has a missing value, it does not 
necessarily mean the navigator did not work with the beneficiary to complete a personalized action 
plan. It is possible the navigator and beneficiary completed the personalized action plan but did not
